site.name: Karaman Calculators
site.tagline: Free calculators for everyday life — finance, health, engineering, math.
site.description: Use free, accurate calculators in 12 languages. No login, no tracking, instant results.

footer.disclaimer: Results are for informational purposes only. Verify before using for critical decisions.

consent.title: We value your privacy
consent.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze traffic, and show relevant ads. You can choose which categories to accept.
consent.essentialDesc: Required for the site to function. Always active.
consent.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how visitors use the site (anonymous).
consent.adsDesc: Allows us to show relevant ads and support free access to calculators.
